name: spin-ts-app
description: TypeScript WASM app with Dapr sidecar

scripts.build: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://spin-ts-app.localhost -o dist/spin-ts-app.wasm
scripts.build:debug: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -d -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://spin-ts-app.localhost -o dist/spin-ts-app.wasm
